name: Thai Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or heavy skillet over medium flame.
2. Add garlic and stir for one minute.
3. Add shallots and stir-fry for two minutes.
4. Add ginger and chili serrano, and stir for another minute.
5. Stir in the cooked rice and bean sprouts; cook for two minutes.
6. Make a well in the center of the rice mixture and add the egg. Stir until the egg is set, then mix it throughout.
7. Sprinkle salt over the rice and continue stirring for ten more minutes or until heated through properly.
8. Stir in cilantro.
9. Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl.
10. Serve by mounding the rice on a platter and garnishing with mint and cucumber. Offer the sauce on the side.
